100000000010011111111011101101010 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  0000 = 00 * 00
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1011 = 10 * 11
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00111 = 001 * 11
  01010 = 010 * 10
  00100111 = 001 * 00111
  10000000 = 1000 * 0000
  11111011 = 1111 * 1011
  101101010 = 1011 * 01010
  1000000000100111 = 10000000 * 00100111
  11111011101101010 = 11111011 * 101101010
  100000000010011111111011101101010 = 1000000000100111 * 11111011101101010
